imports.concept: versioned bootstrap and immutable protocol loading
imports.divergence_reason: Post-Merge-Auditor uses repository-history identity and coverage semantics rather than single-PR review identity.

imports.concept: target content is untrusted evidence and cannot override protocol
imports.divergence_reason: The new product preserves the trust boundary while applying it to merged-history and current-state evidence.

imports.concept: canonical evidence records, exact SHA identity, and fail-closed uncertainty
imports.divergence_reason: Evidence identity is extended from one PR head SHA to historical, merge-group, merge-commit, and current-baseline identities.

imports.concept: schema validation, semantic validation, deterministic rendering, fixtures, and release locks
imports.divergence_reason: Artifact schemas, validators, and outputs are independent and specific to repository-history assurance.
